title: Whole Wheat Monsoon Stir Fry
description: A warm and savory stir-fry dish made with whole wheat and a hint of monsoon spices, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic and stir-fry until the onion is translucent.
Add carrots and bell pepper and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add savory stir fry mix and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Add monsoon rice and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with green onions if desired.
Cook time for rice and vegetables: 10-12 minutes.
Total prep and cooking time: 20-25 minutes.
